domain: Hummingbird hovering figure-eight wingbeat — 75% downstroke + 25% upstroke (inverted) lift; near-continuous lift through wing turn-around; bidirectional propulsion enables stable hover.
specific_mechanism: Bidirectional propulsion with asymmetric force split; both half-cycles contribute usable thrust.
llm_application: FIGURE-EIGHT-DECODE: bidirectional decoder operation where the forward pass produces standard next-token prediction (75% weight) AND a backward revise micro-pass produces a small correction to the just-emitted token (25% weight). Outputs of the two passes are blended; revision occurs before token commit.
novelty_claim: Autoregressive decoding is unidirectional. Speculative/parallel decoding generates drafts. Lookahead decoding extends n-grams. FIGURE-EIGHT-DECODE differs by producing useful signal on a backward revise pass through the same layers with 75/25 weighting and pre-commit blending.
